# bactopia-tests

> Test datasets for the Bactopia bacterial genome analysis pipeline, providing reference data, sequencing reads, assemblies, and tool-specific databases for CI/CD testing of Bactopia Nextflow workflows.

This repository contains test fixtures for [Bactopia](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia), a Nextflow pipeline for the complete analysis of bacterial genomes. It is modeled after the [nf-core test-datasets](https://github.com/nf-core/test-datasets) pattern.

The repo is organized into three top-level directories:

- `species/` - Sequencing reads, assemblies, and annotations for 20 bacterial species
- `datasets/` - Tool-specific reference databases and pre-computed results
- `empty/` - Empty placeholder files used to test error handling in the pipeline

## Key Resources

- [Bactopia](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia): Main Nextflow pipeline repository
- [Bactopia Documentation](https://bactopia.github.io/): User guides and tool documentation
- [nf-core test-datasets](https://github.com/nf-core/test-datasets): The pattern this repo follows

## Species

- [bacillus_anthracis](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/species/bacillus_anthracis)
- [escherichia_coli](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/species/escherichia_coli)
- [escherichia_coli_mcr1](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/species/escherichia_coli_mcr1): MCR-1 positive strain
- [glaesserella_parasuis](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/species/glaesserella_parasuis)
- [haemophilus_influenzae](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/species/haemophilus_influenzae)
- [klebsiella_pneumoniae](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/species/klebsiella_pneumoniae)
- [legionella_pneumophila](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/species/legionella_pneumophila)
- [listeria_monocytogenes](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/species/listeria_monocytogenes)
- [mixed](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/species/mixed): Multi-species test data
- [neisseria_gonorrhoeae](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/species/neisseria_gonorrhoeae)
- [neisseria_meningitidis](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/species/neisseria_meningitidis)
- [portiera](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/species/portiera): Small ~350kb genome, includes Nanopore reads
- [pseudomonas_aeruginosa](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/species/pseudomonas_aeruginosa)
- [salmonella_enterica](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/species/salmonella_enterica)
- [shigella_boydii](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/species/shigella_boydii)
- [shigella_dysenteriae](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/species/shigella_dysenteriae)
- [staphylococcus_aureus](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/species/staphylococcus_aureus)
- [streptococcus_pneumoniae](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/species/streptococcus_pneumoniae)
- [streptococcus_pyogenes](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/species/streptococcus_pyogenes)
- [streptococcus_suis](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/species/streptococcus_suis)

## Datasets

- [amrfinderplus](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/datasets/amrfinderplus): AMRFinder+ antimicrobial resistance results
- [ariba](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/datasets/ariba): ARIBA CARD/VFDB databases
- [blast](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/datasets/blast): BLAST databases for genes, primers, and proteins
- [bracken](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/datasets/bracken): Bracken taxonomic classification results
- [defensefinder](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/datasets/defensefinder): DefenseFinder results
- [emmtyper](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/datasets/emmtyper): emm-type reference sequences
- [generic](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/datasets/generic): Reference genomes, GFFs, metadata, and pan-genome data
- [genotyphi](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/datasets/genotyphi): GenoTyphi Salmonella Typhi genotyping data
- [ismapper](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/datasets/ismapper): ISMapper insertion sequence data
- [mapping-sequences](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/datasets/mapping-sequences): Reference sequences for read mapping
- [mlst](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/datasets/mlst): Multi-locus sequence typing databases
- [rgi](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/datasets/rgi): RGI/CARD resistance gene databases
- [snippy](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/datasets/snippy): Snippy variant calling reference data
- [tbprofiler](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/datasets/tbprofiler): TBProfiler results for Illumina and Nanopore
- [variants](https://github.com/bactopia/bactopia-tests/tree/main/datasets/variants): Variant calling test data

## Optional

The following datasets directories are symlinks to external database caches and will not be present in the GitHub repository:

- bakta, checkm2, eggnog, gtdbtk, kraken2, midas, nohuman, sketcher, srahumanscrubber, sylph

Species directories typically contain subdirectories for different data types:

- `reads/illumina/` - Paired-end and single-end Illumina FASTQ files at various coverage levels
- `reads/nanopore/` - Oxford Nanopore long reads (where available)
- `assembly/` - Pre-assembled genomes
- `compressed/` and `uncompressed/` - Format variants of genomic data

The `empty/` directory contains 21 empty files (e.g., EMPTY_R1.fastq.gz, EMPTY_ASSEMBLY) used to verify the pipeline handles missing or empty input gracefully.

Common file formats: FASTQ (.fastq.gz), FASTA (.fna, .faa, .ffn), GFF (.gff), Mash sketches (.msh), TSV, JSON, CSV.
